disambiguation_rules.the institute: Established entity referenced throughout as parent organization of Research Center and Director
disambiguation_rules.the director: Director of the Institute, approves research plans and establishes peer review procedures
disambiguation_rules.the department: Department of Education, within which research use is coordinated

oddities.note: Document contains extensive structural amendments (redesignation, striking, and insertion of subsections) typical of legislative amendments. Subsection (g) was originally (c), indicating prior structural reorganization. Multiple cross-references to other sections of the same underlying statute (Education Act) suggest this is part of comprehensive legislative package.
